arts.ttl: Lille predicted XI vs Strasbourg: Edon Zhegrova benched while Rémy Cabella starts
arts.sum: Lille OSC will be in desperate need to arrest their recent slide. Four losses in a row across all competitions has been a worrying trend for new manager Bruno Génésio…
